originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__x_10' during its initialization is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'x' during its initialization is never read
reasoning: x = *length at L31 is assigned but never read — the function returns 0 at L33 and x has no other uses. Genuine dead store in all configs. L31 is marked // (6) ERROR, confirming this is a VBDB-known bug location (same line as the uninitialized read in TRANSFORMATION_46; both bugs co-occur). PC = true is correctly constrained: x is dead regardless of CONFIG_SECURITY.
